technologies.name: Energy Technology
technologies.description: Foundation for more advanced power generation and weapons.

technologies.name: Laser Technology
technologies.description: Improves ship weapon damage output in combat.

technologies.name: Shielding Technology
technologies.description: Improves defensive shields on stationed ships and defense towers.

technologies.name: Espionage Technology
technologies.description: Improves probe sensor calibration, increasing the chance that an espionage mission successfully gathers intelligence before being detected.

technologies.name: Chemical Drive
technologies.description: Basic thruster technology. Enables travel between positions within a system. Cheap and improves steadily - overtakes the Ion Drive at high levels. Reaching level 3 unlocks research into the Impulse Drive.

technologies.name: Ion Drive
technologies.description: Higher-efficiency in-system thruster. Pricier and faster than the Chemical Drive out of the gate, but improves more slowly per level.

technologies.name: Impulse Drive
technologies.description: Enables travel between systems within the same galaxy. Cheap and improves steadily - overtakes the Warp Drive at high levels. Requires an in-system drive researched to at least level 3. Reaching level 5 unlocks research into the Hyperspace Drive.

technologies.name: Warp Drive
technologies.description: Advanced inter-system propulsion. Pricier and faster than the Impulse Drive out of the gate, but improves more slowly per level.

technologies.name: Hyperspace Drive
technologies.description: Folds space itself, enabling travel between galaxies. Requires an inter-system drive researched to at least level 5.
